fixture_requirements.name: church.profile
fixture_requirements.shape: { id, slug, name, primaryLanguage, branding{ logo, header } }

adapter_requirements.name: WorkshopApiClient
adapter_requirements.description: Intercepts apiClient.get/post/put/patch/delete and serves fixtures or sandboxed API responses.

adapter_requirements.name: MockAuthProvider
adapter_requirements.description: Provides authenticated user with role variants.

adapter_requirements.name: MockChurchProvider
adapter_requirements.description: Supplies churchId/churchSlug/branding so tenant-aware components render.

adapter_requirements.name: MockLanguageProvider
adapter_requirements.description: i18n provider with portal strings preloaded.

adapter_requirements.name: WorkshopCustomizerProvider
adapter_requirements.description: Layout/theme flags consumed by ChurchPortalLayout and shared chrome.

adapter_requirements.name: MemoryRouterShell
adapter_requirements.description: Each component preview must mount under MemoryRouter with seeded entries (URL + params).

risks.risk: Many components read churchId from ChurchContext / route param / user session. Without a tenant fixture they will throw or display blank.
risks.mitigation: Provide a TenantFixtureProvider supplying churchId, churchSlug, churchName, branding.

risks.risk: 25 files depend on useAuth/AuthContext. Workshop must wrap with a mock AuthProvider exposing a representative church_user/priest profile.
risks.mitigation: Ship MockAuthProvider with role variants (church_user, priest, church_admin, deacon, editor).

risks.risk: Pages call useNavigate / useParams / Outlet from react-router-dom. Workshop must mount each in a MemoryRouter with appropriate :id params.
risks.mitigation: Wrap previews in MemoryRouter with seeded params (e.g., /portal/records/baptism/edit/1).

risks.risk: ChurchPortalLayout consumes CustomizerContext (theme/layout flags). Workshop preview should provide a default Customizer state.
risks.mitigation: Provide CustomizerContext default in Workshop StoryShell.

recommended_import_order.name: Pure shared utilities & types
recommended_import_order.reason: No runtime deps; safe to import first.

recommended_import_order.name: Shared form/table primitives
recommended_import_order.reason: Fixture-only; no API contact when given mock data.

recommended_import_order.name: Portal widgets (no API)
recommended_import_order.reason: Render with fixture data, no live calls.

recommended_import_order.name: Records hub pages (adapter required)
recommended_import_order.reason: Live API surface; gate on WorkshopApiClient.

recommended_import_order.name: Record entry forms
recommended_import_order.reason: Adapter for save endpoints + tenant fixture.

recommended_import_order.name: Settings, Certificates, OCR, Charts, Upload (heavy domain)
